pageDescription: Manage personal prompt presets that can be inserted from chat with /. Admin-managed built-in prompts are available automatically.
description: Create personal prompts that can be triggered with /.
emptyDescription: Create one and type / in chat to insert it.
dialogDescription: A prompt maintained by the user for quick insertion in chat.
viewDescription: A prompt maintained by the platform for quick insertion in chat. Users can view it only and cannot edit it.
deleteDescription: After deletion, this prompt will no longer appear in the / picker. This action cannot be undone.
name: Name
tooLong: Name can be up to 16 characters, description up to 64 characters, and content up to 16384 characters.
